extraction.one_line_summary: MAS Enric soloed to victory after dropping rivals on the final climb, holding 14 seconds with 1km remaining while LANDA chased desperately behind.
tactical_patterns: MAS Enric accelerated when road leveled after final climb, maintaining power on flatter sections to prevent chase coordination.
MÜHLBERGER Gregor paced ROGLIČ in closing kilometers despite race lead secure, prioritizing stage win defense over energy conservation.
LANDA Mikel used Bora-Hansgrohe domestique slipstream in chase, showing Quick-Step isolated MAS without team support in finale.

rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: third Quick-Step win of race, exceptional power maintenance after summit to hold off desperate LANDA chase
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: 12 seconds short despite maximum effort, lacked positioning or teammates to bridge when MAS attacked final climb
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: secured overall victory with time cushion intact, strategic pacing avoided unnecessary energy expenditure
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: neutral: present in chase group behind MAS-LANDA battle, positioning suggests team leader support role
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: neutral: fourth place finish indicates strong climbing but lacked acceleration to follow decisive MAS move
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: fifth place crosses line, presence in lead group without contesting win suggests controlled effort
